red_baseline.summary: Claude Code 2.1.211 accepted the former manifest only with seven warnings: unsupported schemaVersion, id, buildIdentity, node, and components fields, non-kebab-case name, and missing author metadata.

validation.summary: Claude Code 2.1.211 validates the official Claude manifest without warnings; 8 focused generation/host-policy cases and syntax checking pass.
Claude Code installed build 48cc9c90 at isolated user scope, cached the artifact, discovered one Skill and one MCP, and retained the documented CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT runtime argument.

commands: Claude print session from isolated cached artifact with only capabilities.get and task.list allowed
validation.summary: The exact fixture session was blocked before MCP dispatch by the inherited UserPromptSubmit hook because .specify/bin/specify-hook.py is missing. Alternate project-only settings removed the hook but also removed OAuth authentication; no lifecycle mutation was attempted.
Six Claude cells validate with immutable raw receipts: Windows install/routing is failed-visible, Windows lifecycle is not executed, and macOS/Linux routing and lifecycle are not executed.

review.evidence: Official Claude manifest and isolated installation are real-host proven. The inherited hook prevents the project-scoped tool trace, so no lifecycle, update, reload, disable, uninstall, incompatibility, takeover, or cross-host readiness is inferred.

obligation_evidence.evidence: The Windows install/routing cell proves official metadata validation, isolated install/cache discovery, bundled MCP connection, root substitution, and exact host provenance without rolling up readiness.

Fixture routing was blocked before MCP dispatch by the user-level Claude hook; no write, start, update, reload, disable, uninstall, or takeover was attempted, and all dependent claims remain non-ready.

recovery: The official manifest repair is retained. To rerun project-scoped Claude routing, restore the local Spec Kit hook dependency or provide an isolated authenticated Claude configuration that does not inherit the broken UserPromptSubmit hook; then rerun the original ordered route before any lifecycle stage.
